languages.text: "Ты сказал, что исцеление безумия сделает хуже — объясни".
"You said that treating your insanity would make it worse — explain."
languages.original_text: "Ты сказал, что исцеление безумия сделает хуже — объясни".

traits.locale_text: "You said that treating your insanity would make it worse — explain."
"You said that treating your insanity would make it worse — explain."
"You said that treating your insanity would make it worse — explain."

languages.text: «Dice que tratar su locura empeorará la situación. Explíquese».
languages.original_text: "You said that treating your insanity would make it worse — explain."

traits.locale_text: «Dice que tratar su locura empeorará la situación. Explíquese».

languages.text: “你说你这疯病治起来反倒会恶化？解释一下吧。”
languages.original_text: "You said that treating your insanity would make it worse — explain."

traits.locale_text: “你说你这疯病治起来反倒会恶化？解释一下吧。”

languages.text: « Vous avez dit que votre folie empirerait si vous la soigniez. Expliquez-vous. »
languages.original_text: "You said that treating your insanity would make it worse — explain."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez dit que votre folie empirerait si vous la soigniez. Expliquez-vous. »

languages.text: "Deliliğini tedavi etmenin durumu daha da kötüleştireceğini söyledin ya. Açıkla."
languages.original_text: "You said that treating your insanity would make it worse — explain."

traits.locale_text: "Deliliğini tedavi etmenin durumu daha da kötüleştireceğini söyledin ya. Açıkla."

languages.text: "Ihr habt gesagt, Euren Wahnsinn zu behandeln, würde ihn verschlimmern — warum?"
languages.original_text: "You said that treating your insanity would make it worse — explain."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt gesagt, Euren Wahnsinn zu behandeln, würde ihn verschlimmern — warum?"

languages.text: 「狂気を治療すると悪化すると言ったが、説明してくれ」。
languages.original_text: "You said that treating your insanity would make it worse — explain."
